A.does: Iterates the pending update queue on a work-in-progress class component fiber, applying each update to compute the resulting next state.

B.does: Resets the render work loop by creating a fresh work-in-progress root fiber and clearing all in-progress render state so a new render pass can begin cleanly.

comparison: prepareFreshStack is called once at the start of a render attempt to initialize the work loop, whereas processUpdateQueue is called per-fiber during the begin-work phase to derive each class component's next state from its pending updates.
